# `vbmDebug`

**Systems:** VIC20  
**Parameters:** `n`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>vbmDebug( [byte] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[byte] - (0)=show bitmap or (1)=show ROM character set</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
    Use to help understand the layout of the characters that produce the bitmap. In particular, it is
    useful to see how characters are moved around when the vbmScrollLeft and vbmScrollRight commands are used.
</p>

</div>
